//: Tactical-arena layouts. spacesPerLane = slots in each lane. roster places combatants (data/arena-combatants.json) onto side (player|enemy) + lane (front|back) + slot (0..spacesPerLane-1). obstacles are inert in Phase 1: rendered, and they block landing. obstacle.row indexes the six battlefield rows: 0 enemy-back, 1 enemy-front, 2/3 no-man's-land, 4 player-front, 5 player-back.

arenas.name: Greyreach Skirmish
arenas.desc: A first tactical playtest: three heroes against three husks across the hush.
